declarations.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors

members.name: InsufficientGas
members.description: Internal message value is too small for the operation's gas budget.

members.name: WrongWorkchain
members.description: Contract or derived address is not in workchain zero.

members.name: InvalidAmount
members.description: Amount or quote input is invalid.

members.name: MissingFarmingSchedule
members.description: Farming schedule is missing when a farming operation requires it.

members.name: NativePairRequired
members.description: Native-token path was required but the pool is not a native pair.

members.name: PoolLocked
members.description: Pool is administratively locked.

members.name: SwapUnavailable
members.description: Swap or quote is unavailable before start time or without LP supply.

members.name: InvalidFarmingReward
members.description: Farming reward rate is invalid.

members.name: ExactOutUnavailable
members.description: Exact-output quote cannot be satisfied with the supplied input.

members.name: OutputBelowLimit
members.description: Exact-input quote output is below the requested minimum.

members.name: LockedLiquidityDisabled
members.description: Locked-liquidity status flag disallows this provision mode.

members.name: BurnAmountExceedsUnlockedSupply
members.description: LP burn amount exceeds unlocked LP supply.

members.name: InvalidInitialLiquidity
members.description: Initial liquidity invariant check failed.

members.name: InvalidSender
members.description: Sender wallet or account address failed deterministic authentication.

members.name: UnsupportedOperation
members.description: Dispatcher fallback for unsupported opcodes.

declarations.description: Source-level exit-code catalog observed in the decompiled live pool code.

get_methods.name: get_tvl

get_methods.name: get_liquidity_info

get_methods.name: get_dynamic_fee_by_timestamp

get_methods.name: get_farming_info

get_methods.name: get_expected_swap_result

get_methods.name: get_collected_fees_info

get_methods.name: get_storage

get_methods.name: whoami

get_methods.name: get_jetton_data

get_methods.name: get_start_trade_time

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.InvalidSender
thrown_errors.description: Sender wallet or account address failed deterministic authentication.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.InsufficientGas
thrown_errors.description: Internal message value is too small for the operation's gas budget.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.WrongWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Contract or derived address is not in workchain zero.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Amount or quote input is invalid.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.MissingFarmingSchedule
thrown_errors.description: Farming schedule is missing when a farming operation requires it.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.NativePairRequired
thrown_errors.description: Native-token path was required but the pool is not a native pair.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.PoolLocked
thrown_errors.description: Pool is administratively locked.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.SwapUnavailable
thrown_errors.description: Swap or quote is unavailable before start time or without LP supply.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.InvalidFarmingReward
thrown_errors.description: Farming reward rate is invalid.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.ExactOutUnavailable
thrown_errors.description: Exact-output quote cannot be satisfied with the supplied input.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.OutputBelowLimit
thrown_errors.description: Exact-input quote output is below the requested minimum.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.LockedLiquidityDisabled
thrown_errors.description: Locked-liquidity status flag disallows this provision mode.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.BurnAmountExceedsUnlockedSupply
thrown_errors.description: LP burn amount exceeds unlocked LP supply.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.InvalidInitialLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Initial liquidity invariant check failed.

thrown_errors.name: BidaskDammPoolErrors.UnsupportedOperation
thrown_errors.description: Dispatcher fallback for unsupported opcodes.

declarations.name: DedustPoolV2Errors

members.name: InvalidLpWalletSender
members.description: LP burn notification sender is not the deterministic LP wallet.

members.name: InvalidControlSender
members.description: Control message sender is not the stored Factory/proof address.

members.name: InvalidAssetOrProof
members.description: Asset tag or proof shape is invalid for this Pool.

members.name: InsufficientValue
members.description: Attached value cannot cover the required downstream fee budget.

members.name: InvalidVaultSender
members.description: Swap-external sender is not the authenticated Vault.

members.name: InvalidPoolSender
members.description: Swap-peer sender is not the authenticated Pool.

members.name: InvalidLiquidityDepositSender
members.description: Liquidity-deposit callback sender is not the authenticated deposit contract.

members.name: InvalidTradeFee
members.description: Trade fee is outside the accepted range.

members.name: InvalidTokenWallet
members.description: Message token wallet does not match either Pool asset wallet.

members.name: MissingPayoutTarget
members.description: Payout target address is absent.

members.name: InvalidWithdrawalAsset
members.description: Withdrawal branch does not match the requested asset side.

members.name: InvalidRequestAsset
members.description: Requested asset does not match either Pool asset.

members.name: InvalidAmount
members.description: Requested amount must be positive.

members.name: ProtocolFeeExceeded
members.description: Protocol-fee withdrawal exceeds accumulated fees.

members.name: EmptyLiquidity
members.description: Pool has no LP supply for swap pricing.

members.name: InvalidChildSender
members.description: Deterministic child-contract sender does not match the expected address.

members.name: SlippageExceeded
members.description: Swap output is below the requested minimum.

members.name: DeadlineExceeded
members.description: Swap deadline has passed.

members.name: UnsupportedOperation
members.description: Incoming internal message opcode is unsupported.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidLpWalletSender
thrown_errors.description: LP burn notification sender is not the deterministic LP wallet.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidControlSender
thrown_errors.description: Control message sender is not the stored Factory/proof address.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidAssetOrProof
thrown_errors.description: Asset tag or proof shape is invalid for this Pool.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InsufficientValue
thrown_errors.description: Attached value cannot cover the required downstream fee budget.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidVaultSender
thrown_errors.description: Swap-external sender is not the authenticated Vault.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidPoolSender
thrown_errors.description: Swap-peer sender is not the authenticated Pool.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidLiquidityDepositSender
thrown_errors.description: Liquidity-deposit callback sender is not the authenticated deposit contract.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidTradeFee
thrown_errors.description: Trade fee is outside the accepted range.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidTokenWallet
thrown_errors.description: Message token wallet does not match either Pool asset wallet.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.MissingPayoutTarget
thrown_errors.description: Payout target address is absent.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidWithdrawalAsset
thrown_errors.description: Withdrawal branch does not match the requested asset side.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidRequestAsset
thrown_errors.description: Requested asset does not match either Pool asset.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Requested amount must be positive.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.ProtocolFeeExceeded
thrown_errors.description: Protocol-fee withdrawal exceeds accumulated fees.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.EmptyLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Pool has no LP supply for swap pricing.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.InvalidChildSender
thrown_errors.description: Deterministic child-contract sender does not match the expected address.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.SlippageExceeded
thrown_errors.description: Swap output is below the requested minimum.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.DeadlineExceeded
thrown_errors.description: Swap deadline has passed.

thrown_errors.name: DedustPoolV2Errors.UnsupportedOperation
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal message opcode is unsupported.

members.name: InvalidJettonWalletSender

members.name: InsufficientValue
members.description: Attached value cannot cover the required downstream fee budget.

members.name: InvalidPoolSender

members.name: InvalidLiquidityDepositSender
members.description: Liquidity-deposit payout sender is not the authenticated Liquidity Deposit.

members.name: VaultNotReady
members.description: Vault is not ready for code upgrade.

members.description: Vault readiness state does not match the requested operation.

members.description: Liquidity-deposit target amounts must be positive.

members.description: Liquidity-deposit asset does not match the vault asset side.

members.name: InvalidOperatorSender
members.description: Reset-gas sender is not the deterministic Operator contract.

members.name: UnsupportedOperation
members.description: Incoming internal or forward-payload opcode is unsupported.

compilerAbi.author: EVAA

declarations.name: EvaaUserPrincipal

fields.name: principal
fields.description: Signed asset principal; positive values are supplied assets and negative values are borrowed assets.

fields.name: borrowTail
fields.description: Optional inline borrow metadata after negative principals.

declarations.description: Runtime value stored in the user principal dictionary.

declarations.name: EvaaUserReward

fields.name: trackingIndex
fields.description: Base tracking index used to accrue future supply or borrow rewards.

fields.name: trackingAccrued
fields.description: Accrued tracking amount for this user and asset.

declarations.description: Per-asset reward tracking value stored in the user reward dictionary.

declarations.name: EvaaUserStorage

fields.name: codeVersion
fields.description: User code version stored as TON `Coins` in the root cell.

fields.name: masterAddress
fields.description: Master contract address authorized to send upgrade-wrapped user commands.

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.description: Owner address of this user position.

fields.name: userPrincipals
fields.description: Principal dictionary keyed by 256-bit EVAA asset id.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Lock state: zero is free, negative values are supply-withdraw locks, positive values count liquidations.

fields.name: userRewards
fields.description: Reward dictionary keyed by 256-bit EVAA asset id.

fields.name: backupCell1
fields.description: Reserved optional backup cell for future-compatible storage.

fields.name: backupCell2
fields.description: Reserved optional backup cell for future-compatible storage.

declarations.description: Runtime storage after user-code initialization has appended reward and backup fields.

declarations.name: EvaaUserDeploymentStorage

fields.name: codeVersion
fields.description: User code version stored as TON `Coins` in the root cell.

fields.name: masterAddress
fields.description: Master contract address authorized to complete initialization.

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.description: Owner address used for the user position.

fields.name: userPrincipals
fields.description: Initial principal dictionary keyed by 256-bit EVAA asset id.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Initial lock state.

declarations.description: Initial user storage shape before the runtime upgrade hook appends reward and backup fields.

declarations.description: Extended boolean encoded in two bits: `00` for false and `11` for true.

declarations.description: EVAA price dictionary keyed by 256-bit asset id with compressed coin prices.

fields.name: userCodeVersion
fields.description: Code version expected by the master for this command.

fields.description: Optional upgrade payload with new code and data.

fields.description: Two-bit extended boolean deciding whether to execute upgrade logic.

fields.description: Upgrade header parsed before the command opcode.

fields.name: op
fields.description: Request selector encoded as TON `Coins`; expected value is `0x9998`.

fields.description: Query id copied into the storage response.

fields.name: bodyData
fields.description: Request payload returned unchanged in the response.

fields.name: subaccountId
fields.description: Subaccount id selected by the master-side operation.

fields.name: returnRepayRemainingsFlag
fields.description: Two-bit flag asking the master to return repay remainings.

fields.name: customPayloadRecipient
fields.description: Optional custom-payload recipient; absent when the master request had no recipient.

fields.name: customPayloadSaturationFlag
fields.description: Two-bit flag asking the user to saturate the custom response payload.

fields.name: initialSender
fields.description: Optional initial sender address from the master-side operation.

declarations.description: Extra ref attached to `supply_user`.

fields.name: queryId

members.description: Text payload length is invalid.

members.name: ForbiddenNotStake
members.description: Active auction accepts only plain zero-op bid transfers.

members.description: Top-up is allowed only from the current owner after auction end.

members.description: DNS record changes are allowed only from the current owner.

members.description: Auction management is allowed only from the current owner.

members.description: Auction cancellation is forbidden after bids have arrived.

declarations.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV3R3Errors

members.name: UnauthorizedAddress
members.description: Sender is not authorized for the command.

members.name: LowBid
members.description: Bid or externally ended profit is below the required threshold.

members.name: AlreadyInitiated
members.description: NFT ownership callback attempted to initialize an already initialized auction.

members.name: InvalidOwnershipAssigned
members.description: NFT callback opcode was not `ownership_assigned`.

members.name: NotMessage
members.description: Defined in `exit-codes.func`; no source throw site was found in V3R3.

members.name: NotCancel
members.description: Emergency relay is not allowed in the current active/cancel state.

members.name: AuctionEnded
members.description: Auction is already ended, cancelled, or past end time in a rejecting branch.

members.name: AlreadyActivated
members.description: Defined in `exit-codes.func`; no source throw site was found in V3R3.

members.name: CannotCancelEnded
members.description: Defined in `exit-codes.func`; no source throw site was found in V3R3.

members.name: LowAmount
members.description: Command attached less than the required 0.1 TON.

members.name: CannotCancelWithBid
members.description: Cancellation is forbidden after a bid exists.

members.name: CannotStopBeforeEndTime
members.description: Stop command was sent before end time.

members.name: NonProfitableFees
members.description: Marketplace and royalty fee factors leave no positive seller profit.

members.name: BadEmergencySendMode
members.description: Emergency relay send mode includes forbidden bit 32.

members.name: LastBidTooClose
members.description: Emergency relay is too close to end time or the latest bid time.

members.name: AuctionDurationTooLong
members.description: Auction duration remaining exceeds 20 days.

members.name: NotActivatedYet
members.description: Command or bid requires an activated auction.

members.name: UnknownExternalOperation
members.description: External message opcode is not supported.

declarations.description: Source-level exit-code catalog for Getgems NFT auction V3R3.

declarations.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors

members.name: InvalidSignature
members.description: Signature over the Jetton wallet update payload is invalid.

members.name: InvalidJettonWalletWorkchain
members.description: Resolved Jetton wallet is not in workchain 0.

members.name: UnauthorizedAddress
members.description: Sender is not authorized for owner, marketplace, bidder, or expected Jetton-wallet flows.

members.name: InvalidJettonNotificationWorkchain
members.description: Jetton transfer notification sender is not in workchain 0.

members.name: LowBid
members.description: Bid is below the minimum accepted amount, or external settlement balance is too low.

members.name: AlreadyInitiated
members.description: NFT ownership assignment attempted after the auction already has an owner.

members.name: InvalidOpExpectOwnershipAssigned
members.description: NFT-originated activation body is not `ownership_assigned`.

members.name: EmergencyProxyNotAllowed
members.description: Marketplace emergency proxy is not allowed while a normal active auction can still proceed.

members.name: AlreadyExecuted
members.description: Auction was already cancelled, force-closed, or settled.

members.name: AlreadyActivated
members.description: Jetton wallet update attempted after the one-time public key was consumed or absent.

members.name: NotEnoughTons
members.description: Attached TON value is below the command-specific processing budget.

members.name: AlreadyHasBid
members.description: Cancellation or Jetton wallet update is blocked after a bid exists.

members.name: AuctionInProgress
members.description: Finish attempted before end time.

members.name: BadEmergencySendMode
members.description: Marketplace emergency proxy tried to use send mode bit 32.

members.name: LastBidTooClose
members.description: Marketplace emergency proxy was attempted too close to the end time or last bid time.

members.name: AuctionDurationTooLong
members.description: Auction duration is more than 20 days from the current time.

members.name: AuctionHasNotBeenActivatedYet
members.description: Bid, cancel, or finish attempted before NFT ownership assignment activated the auction.

members.name: AuctionIsInABrokenState
members.description: Fee math or Jetton setup marks the auction as broken.

members.name: WrongCurrency
members.description: TON bid sent to Jetton auction, Jetton bid sent to TON auction, or wrong Jetton wallet sent notification.

members.name: UnknownOperation
members.description: Incoming internal or external opcode is not recognized.

declarations.description: Source-proven exit-code catalog for auction command validation.

thrown_errors.description: Attached TON value is below the command-specific processing budget.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AlreadyHasBid
thrown_errors.description: Cancellation or Jetton wallet update is blocked after a bid exists.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionInProgress
thrown_errors.description: Finish attempted before end time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.BadEmergencySendMode
thrown_errors.description: Marketplace emergency proxy tried to use send mode bit 32.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.LastBidTooClose
thrown_errors.description: Marketplace emergency proxy was attempted too close to the end time or last bid time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionDurationTooLong
thrown_errors.description: Auction duration is more than 20 days from the current time.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionHasNotBeenActivatedYet
thrown_errors.description: Bid, cancel, or finish attempted before NFT ownership assignment activated the auction.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.AuctionIsInABrokenState
thrown_errors.description: Fee math or Jetton setup marks the auction as broken.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.WrongCurrency
thrown_errors.description: TON bid sent to Jetton auction, Jetton bid sent to TON auction, or wrong Jetton wallet sent notification.

thrown_errors.name: GetgemsNftAuctionV4R1Errors.UnknownOperation
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal or external opcode is not recognized.

declarations.name: StateInit
declarations.description:
`StateInit` is a "canonical TL/B representation from block.tlb" of a contract initial state.
But for everyday tasks, it's too complicated. It is not used in practice.
To represent code+data, consider [ContractState].
To represent sharding (fixedPrefixLength, formerly splitDepth), consider [AutoDeployAddress].

compilerAbi.description: Hipo Finance Treasury contract for TON staking deposits, delayed unstake bills, validator loans, governance, and wallet/collection proxy operations.

declarations.name: HipoTreasuryEmpty

declarations.name: HipoTreasuryExtension

fields.name: previousRate

fields.name: currentRate
fields.description: Current token/coin rate scaled by 1e9.

fields.name: halter

fields.name: governor
fields.description: Address allowed to perform governance-only operations.

fields.name: proposedGovernor
fields.description: Optional referenced proposed-governor record.

fields.name: governanceFee
fields.description: Governance fee numerator over 65535, applied to treasury rewards.

fields.name: collectionCodes

fields.name: billCodes

fields.description: Historical parent-address hashes keyed by uint256; values are empty set markers.

declarations.description: Runtime extension cell referenced by the root storage cell.

declarations.name: HipoTreasuryStorage

fields.name: totalCoins

fields.description: Total hTON token supply tracked by the treasury.

fields.name: totalBorrowersStake

fields.description: Active parent contract address; source can store `addr_none` during setup.

fields.description: Participation records keyed by validator round `round_since`.

fields.name: roundsImbalance
fields.description: Round imbalance factor stored as uint8 and used by distribution sizing.

fields.description: One-bit flag selecting instant minting when no delayed round is needed.

fields.name: extension
fields.description: Referenced extension cell containing rates, governance, code dictionaries, and old parents.

members.description: Nominator count exceeds the configured maximum.

members.description: Nominator stake is below the configured minimum.

members.description: Nominator dictionary depth exceeds the source guard.

members.description: Withdrawal request sender is not a nominator.

members.description: Nonzero message opcode is not supported.

members.description: Validator deposit sender is not the validator masterchain wallet.

members.description: Validator deposit or withdrawal state/value precondition failed.

members.description: New-stake value is below the minimum stake to send.

members.description: New-stake value exceeds spendable Pool balance.

members.description: Validator-owned amount is below the configured validator minimum.

members.name: ValidatorReserveTooLow
members.description: Validator-owned amount is below the recommended punishment reserve.

members.name: WithdrawRequestsExist
members.description: Withdrawal requests exist when new-stake is requested.

members.description: Recover-stake was requested before the hold-period condition matured.

members.description: Validator-set hash update was requested after the change-count limit.

compilerAbi.description: Stakee STAKEED Jetton minter for pool-admin minting, burn accounting, discovery, DAO voting hooks, storage, and getters.

declarations.name: StakeedMinterStorage

fields.name: totalSupply

fields.description: Nanotons forwarded from the wallet to the owner notification.

fields.description: Nanotons attached to the wallet deployment/internal-transfer message; zero means carry remaining value.

declarations.name: StakeedMinterErrors

members.name: UnauthorizedMintRequest
members.description: Sender is not the stored admin for mint requests.

members.name: UnauthorizedBurnRequest
members.description: Burn notification did not come from the deterministic wallet for the reported owner.

members.name: DiscoveryFeeNotMatched
members.description: `provide_wallet_address` value cannot cover the discovery response budget.

members.name: UnauthorizedChangeAdminRequest
members.description: Sender is not the stored admin for `change_admin`.

members.name: UnauthorizedChangeContentRequest
members.description: Sender is not the stored admin for `change_content`.

members.name: UnauthorizedVoteExecution
members.description: Voting callback sender is not the deterministic voting contract.

members.name: UnauthorizedCodeUpgradeRequest
members.description: Sender is not the stored admin for code upgrades.

members.name: ForbiddenVotingType
members.description: Create-voting request uses a voting mode forbidden by poll-style parameters.

members.name: MintFeeNotMatched
members.description: Mint message value does not cover wallet forward amount and chain fee budget.

members.name: VotingNotFinished
members.description: Execute-vote-result arrived before the recorded expiration timestamp.

members.name: VotingAlreadyFinished
members.description: Voting creation date or duration is already finished.

members.name: ExpirationDateTooHigh
members.description: Voting creation date or duration exceeds the maximum voting duration.

members.name: UnknownOperation
members.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported by the minter dispatcher.

declarations.description: STAKEED minter exit-code catalog.

get_methods.name: get_voting_code

get_methods.name: get_voting_results_address
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic voting-results contract address for a poll body and duration.

declarations.name: StakeePoolErrors

members.name: UnknownOperation
members.description: Message opcode is unsupported, or a loan-position getter could not find the requested controller.

members.name: WrongSender
members.description: Sender does not match the role, minter, or derived controller expected by a branch.

members.name: WrongState
members.description: Pool state is not valid for the requested branch.

members.name: Halted
members.description: Pool is halted while the branch requires normal operation.

members.name: SudoerQuarantine
members.description: Sudoer update quarantine period is still active.

members.name: GovernorUpdateTooSoon
members.description: New governor update was requested too soon.

members.name: GovernorUpdateNotMatured
members.description: Prepared governor update has not matured yet.

members.name: InterestTooLow
members.description: Controller's max accepted interest is below Pool interest.

members.name: ContradictingBorrowingParams
members.description: Loan minimum is greater than loan maximum after Pool limits are applied.

members.name: NotEnoughFundsForLoan
members.description: Pool does not have enough available funds for the requested loan.

members.name: TotalCreditTooHigh
members.description: Controller total credit would exceed the configured maximum.

members.name: BorrowingRequestInClosedRound
members.description: Controller requested borrowing after the current round was closed.

members.name: DepositAmountTooLow
members.description: Attached TON deposit amount is below the deposit fee.

members.name: DepositsAreClosed
members.description: Deposits are closed.

members.name: OutputAmountIsZero
members.description: Deposit or withdrawal conversion would produce a zero output amount.

members.name: NotEnoughTonToProcess
members.description: Attached TON value is insufficient for withdrawal processing budget.

members.name: ControllerInWrongWorkchain
members.description: Derived controller address is not in the expected workchain.

members.name: CreditBookTooDeep
members.description: Borrower credit-book depth limit would be exceeded.

members.name: UnknownBorrower
members.description: Borrower dictionary lookup failed where a known borrower was required.

members.name: FinalizingActiveCreditRound
members.description: Round-finalization logic was asked to finalize an active credit round.

members.name: TooEarlyStakeRecoverAttemptCount
members.description: Stake recovery attempt counter is too early.

members.name: TooEarlyStakeRecoverAttemptTime
members.description: Stake recovery attempt time is too early.

members.name: TooLowRecoverStakeValue
members.description: Attached value for stake recovery is too low.

members.name: NotEnoughMoneyToPayFine
members.description: Controller does not have enough money to pay the fine.

members.name: TooLowRequestLoanValue
members.description: Attached value for loan request is too low.

members.name: TooMuchValidatorSetCounts
members.description: Validator-set count tuple is too large for update logic.

members.name: NoNewHash
members.description: Validator-set update did not provide a new hash.

members.name: WithdrawalWhileCredited
members.description: Withdrawal was requested while the controller is credited.

members.name: IncorrectWithdrawalAmount
members.description: Withdrawal amount is not valid for controller accounting.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeQueryId
members.description: Controller new-stake query id is incorrect.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeRequestValue
members.description: Controller new-stake request value is incorrect.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeValueLtMinimum
members.description: Controller new-stake value is below the minimum.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeValueTooHigh
members.description: Controller new-stake value is too high.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeWronglyUsedCredit
members.description: Controller new-stake incorrectly uses credited funds.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeSolvencyNotGuaranteed
members.description: Controller new-stake would not guarantee solvency.

members.name: ControllerNotApproved
members.description: Controller has not been approved by the configured approver.

members.name: MultipleLoansAreProhibited
members.description: Multiple loans are prohibited for this controller path.

members.name: TooEarlyLoanRequest
members.description: Controller requested a loan too early.

members.name: TooLateLoanRequest
members.description: Controller requested a loan too late.

members.name: TooHighLoanRequestAmount
members.description: Controller requested too large a loan.

members.name: CreditInterestTooHigh
members.description: Controller requested too high a credit interest.

members.name: NoCredit
members.description: Controller attempted to return a loan where no credit exists.

members.name: TooEarlyLoanReturn
members.description: Controller attempted to return a loan too early.

declarations.description: Pool exit-code catalog.

get_methods.name: get_pool_full_data
get_methods.description: Return complete Pool data after first refreshing round accounting.

get_methods.name: get_pool_full_data_raw
get_methods.description: Return complete Pool data without refreshing round accounting.

get_methods.name: get_controller_address
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic validator controller address for `controllerId` and `validator`.

get_methods.name: get_controller_address_legacy
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic validator controller address as legacy workchain/hash tuple.

get_methods.name: get_loan
get_methods.description: Return principal and accounted interest for a controller in current or previous round data.

get_methods.name: get_controller_loan_position
get_methods.description: Return median-position data for a controller address hash in current or previous round data.

get_methods.name: calculate_loan_amount
get_methods.description: Return the loan amount the Pool would grant for the supplied controller limits, or -1 when unavailable.

compilerAbi.author: Stakee
compilerAbi.description: Stakee Validator Controller for storage, controller commands, Pool and Elector messages, getters, and exit codes.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRoles

fields.name: approver
fields.description: Address authorized to approve or disapprove this controller.

fields.name: halter
fields.description: Address authorized to halt this controller.

declarations.description: Shared static role cell referenced from the controller static-data cell.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerStaticData

fields.name: controllerId
fields.description: Pool-assigned controller id stored as uint32 in the static-data ref.

fields.name: validator
fields.description: Validator wallet address authorized for staking, hash updates, withdrawals, and loan requests.

fields.name: pool
fields.description: Stakee pool address authorized for credits and loan-repayment bounces.

fields.name: governor
fields.description: Governor address authorized for sudoer/unhalt/return-available-funds requests.

fields.name: roles
fields.description: Referenced approver/halter role addresses.

declarations.description: Static controller identity copied into outgoing pool loan requests.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerStorage

fields.name: state
fields.description: Controller state: 0 REST, 1 SENT_BORROWING_REQUEST, 2 SENT_STAKE_REQUEST, 3 FUNDS_STAKEN, 4 SENT_RECOVER_REQUEST, 5 INSOLVENT.

fields.name: halted
fields.description: Halt flag for safety and governance paths.

fields.name: approved
fields.description: Whether the approver has approved loan requests for this controller.

fields.name: stakeAmountSent
fields.description: Stake amount sent to Elector after subtracting the controller operation fee.

fields.name: stakeAt
fields.description: Election round timestamp accepted by Elector for the current/last stake.

fields.name: savedValidatorSetHash
fields.description: Validator-set cell hash saved when staking or updating validator-set state.

fields.name: validatorSetChangesCount
fields.description: Count of validator-set changes observed after the stake request.

fields.name: validatorSetChangeTime
fields.description: Unix timestamp of the last saved validator-set change.

fields.name: stakeHeldFor
fields.description: Stake hold duration from validator config, stored as a timestamp-width integer.

fields.name: borrowedAmount
fields.description: Borrowed amount including interest owed to the Stakee pool.

fields.name: borrowingTime
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the current loan was first borrowed.

fields.name: sudoer
fields.description: Optional sudoer address; live mainnet storage can contain `addr_none`.

fields.name: sudoerSetAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when `sudoer` was set.

fields.name: maxExpectedInterest
fields.description: Maximum expected interest share encoded as 24 bits.

fields.name: staticData
fields.description: Referenced static controller identity and role data.

declarations.description: Runtime controller state stored in the root data cell by `save_data`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerTopUp

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Caller-selected query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Controller top-up command with attached value and op/query header.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerCredit

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Pool query id copied from the loan request/credit flow.

fields.name: creditAmount
fields.description: Borrowed amount including interest, parsed as TL-B Coins.

declarations.description: Pool-originated loan credit notification.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerApprove

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Approver query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Approver-originated command that marks this controller approved.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerDisapprove

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Approver query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Approver-originated command that clears controller approval.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerSudoSendMessage

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Sudoer query id parsed by the common body header.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Raw full message cell passed to `send_raw_message`.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: TVM send mode loaded after the message ref.

declarations.description: Sudoer raw-message relay with message cell followed by send mode.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerSetSudoer

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Governor query id parsed by the common body header.

fields.name: sudoer
fields.description: New sudoer message address, including `addr_none`.

declarations.description: Governor command that replaces the quarantined sudoer address.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerUnhalt

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Governor query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Governor command that clears the halted flag.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerReturnAvailableFunds

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the outgoing pool loan-repayment body.

declarations.description: Governor command that repays available insolvent funds to the pool.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerHalt

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Halter query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Halter command that sets the halted flag through the shared halter request.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRecoverStake

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the outgoing Elector `recover_stake` body.

declarations.description: Validator command that asks Elector to recover stake.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerUpdateValidatorHash

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Validator query id parsed by the common body header.

declarations.description: Validator command that refreshes the saved validator-set hash after staking.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerWithdrawValidator

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the outgoing validator withdrawal notification.

fields.name: requestAmount
fields.description: Requested withdrawal amount; the outgoing body does not repeat this field.

declarations.description: Validator command that withdraws TON from the controller wallet back to validator.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerNewStake

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Non-zero query id copied into the outgoing Elector `new_stake` body and Elector response.

fields.name: stakeValue
fields.description: TON amount sent to Elector as the message value.

fields.name: validatorPubkey
fields.description: Validator public key forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: stakeAt
fields.description: Election round timestamp forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: maxFactor
fields.description: Validator max-factor forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: adnlAddr
fields.description: Validator ADNL address forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: signature
fields.description: Validator signature cell, encoded as `^bits512`.

declarations.description: Controller-specific validator stake command; unlike Elector body it includes `stakeValue` before the Elector payload.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerSendRequestLoan

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the outgoing pool `request_loan` body.

fields.name: minLoan
fields.description: Minimum acceptable loan amount.

fields.name: maxLoan
fields.description: Maximum requested loan amount.

fields.name: maxInterest
fields.description: Maximum accepted interest share encoded as 24 bits.

declarations.description: Validator command that asks the pool for a loan during the request window.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerReturnUnusedLoan

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the outgoing pool loan-repayment body.

declarations.description: Validator command that repays an unused loan after the next round starts.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerNewStakeOk

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the Elector request.

fields.name: comment
fields.description: Elector comment field present in standard `new_stake_ok` bodies.

declarations.description: Elector success response for `new_stake`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerNewStakeError

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the Elector request.

fields.name: tail
fields.description: Remaining Elector error tail or bounce-derived data.

declarations.description: Elector failure response for `new_stake` with remaining error tail.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRecoverStakeOk

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the Elector request.

declarations.description: Elector success response for `recover_stake`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRecoverStakeError

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the Elector request when present.

fields.name: tail
fields.description: Remaining Elector error tail or bounce-derived data.

declarations.description: Elector failure response for `recover_stake` with remaining error tail.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerPoolRequestLoan

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the validator request.

fields.name: minLoan
fields.description: Minimum acceptable loan amount copied from the validator request.

fields.name: maxLoan
fields.description: Maximum requested loan amount copied from the validator request.

fields.name: maxInterest
fields.description: Maximum accepted interest share copied as uint24.

fields.name: controllerData
fields.description: Static controller identity and role data forwarded to the pool as a ref.

declarations.description: Pool loan request emitted by controller after validating the request window and solvency.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerPoolLoanRepayment

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the triggering controller or Elector response.

declarations.description: Pool loan repayment body emitted after stake recovery or unused-loan return.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerElectorNewStake

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the validator command.

fields.name: validatorPubkey
fields.description: Validator public key forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: stakeAt
fields.description: Election round timestamp forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: maxFactor
fields.description: Validator max-factor forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: adnlAddr
fields.description: Validator ADNL address forwarded to Elector.

fields.name: signature
fields.description: Validator signature cell, encoded as `^bits512`.

declarations.description: Elector `new_stake` body emitted by the controller, without the controller-only `stakeValue` field.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerElectorRecoverStake

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the validator command.

declarations.description: Elector `recover_stake` body emitted by the controller.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerValidatorWithdrawal

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from `withdraw_validator`; withdrawal amount is the TON message value.

declarations.description: Validator notification body emitted after a successful withdrawal request.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerEmptyBody
declarations.description: Empty body emitted for value-only excess or bounty transfers.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerBouncedKnownBody

fields.name: originalOpcode
fields.description: Original bounced opcode after the TVM bounce prefix.

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Original query id when the bounced body used the standard op/query header.

fields.name: tail
fields.description: Remaining bounced payload, if any, after the common header.

declarations.description: Protocol bounce body observed from failed controller requests.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerDataReply

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current state code returned from storage.

fields.name: halted
fields.description: Halt flag returned as TVM bool.

fields.name: approved
fields.description: Approval flag returned as TVM bool.

fields.name: stakeAmountSent
fields.description: Stored stake amount sent to Elector.

fields.name: stakeAt
fields.description: Stored stake timestamp.

fields.name: savedValidatorSetHash
fields.description: Stored validator-set hash.

fields.name: validatorSetChangesCount
fields.description: Stored validator-set change counter.

fields.name: validatorSetChangeTime
fields.description: Stored validator-set change timestamp.

fields.name: stakeHeldFor
fields.description: Stored stake hold duration.

fields.name: borrowedAmount
fields.description: Stored borrowed amount including interest.

fields.name: borrowingTime
fields.description: Stored borrowing timestamp.

fields.name: validator
fields.description: Validator stack address; getter returns a raw MsgAddress.

fields.name: pool
fields.description: Pool stack address; getter returns a raw MsgAddress.

fields.name: sudoer
fields.description: Sudoer stack address, possibly `addr_none`.

declarations.description: Structured result returned by `get_validator_controller_data`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRequiredBalanceForLoanReply

fields.name: requiredBalance
fields.description: Required validator balance to safely request a loan.

fields.name: validatorAmount
fields.description: Current validator-owned amount after subtracting outstanding borrowed amount.

declarations.description: Structured result returned by `required_balance_for_loan`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerRequestWindowTimeReply

fields.name: since
fields.description: Earliest Unix timestamp at which loan requests are accepted.

fields.name: until
fields.description: Latest Unix timestamp before loan requests close.

declarations.description: Structured result returned by `request_window_time`.

declarations.name: StakeeValidatorControllerErrors

members.name: UnknownOp
members.description: Message opcode is unsupported in the active dispatcher branch.

members.name: WrongSender
members.description: Sender does not match the role required by the operation.

members.name: WrongState
members.description: Operation is not valid in the current controller state.

members.name: Halted
members.description: Operation is blocked while the controller is halted.

members.name: SudoerQuarantine
members.description: Sudoer change is attempted before the quarantine period matures.

members.name: TooEarlyStakeRecoverAttemptCount
members.description: Stake recovery was requested before enough validator-set changes were observed.

members.name: TooEarlyStakeRecoverAttemptTime
members.description: Stake recovery was requested before the unfreeze timing condition was met.

members.name: TooLowRecoverStakeValue
members.description: Attached TON is below the Elector recover-stake operation value.

members.name: TooLowRequestLoanValue
members.description: Attached TON is below the minimum request-loan operation value.

members.name: TooMuchValidatorSetCounts
members.description: Validator-set change counter would exceed the accepted bound.

members.name: NoNewHash
members.description: Validator-set hash update did not find a new hash.

members.name: WithdrawalWhileCredited
members.description: Validator withdrawal is attempted while borrowed funds are outstanding.

members.name: IncorrectWithdrawalAmount
members.description: Validator withdrawal requested a non-positive amount.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeQueryId
members.description: New-stake query id is zero, so Elector confirmation could not be correlated.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeRequestValue
members.description: Attached TON is below the controller new-stake operation fee.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeValueLtMinimum
members.description: New-stake value is below the minimum stake.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeValueTooHigh
members.description: New-stake value would leave too little controller balance for reserves and fines.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeWronglyUsedCredit
members.description: Borrowed funds are used outside the round in which they were obtained.

members.name: IncorrectNewStakeSolvencyNotGuaranteed
members.description: New-stake would not leave enough validator-owned funds to guarantee solvency.

members.name: ControllerNotApproved
members.description: Loan request is attempted before the controller is approved.

members.name: MultipleLoansAreProhibited
members.description: Loan request is attempted while another loan is outstanding.

members.name: TooEarlyLoanRequest
members.description: Loan request is attempted before the election request window opens.

members.name: TooLateLoanRequest
members.description: Loan request is attempted after the election request window closes.

members.name: TooHighLoanRequestAmount
members.description: Requested loan amount is above the safe solvency bound.

members.name: CreditInterestTooHigh
members.description: Pool credit amount exceeds the configured maximum expected interest.

members.name: NoCredit
members.description: Unused-loan return is attempted when no credit is outstanding.

members.name: TooEarlyLoanReturn
members.description: Unused-loan return is attempted before the next round starts.

declarations.description: Controller exit-code catalog.

get_methods.name: get_validator_controller_data
get_methods.description: Return the controller runtime state and selected static addresses.

get_methods.name: get_max_punishment
get_methods.description: Return the maximum recommended punishment for a validator stake value.

get_methods.name: get_max_stake_value
get_methods.description: Return the maximum stake value the controller can send, or `-1` when staking is unavailable.

get_methods.name: required_balance_for_loan
get_methods.description: Return required balance and validator-owned amount for a candidate loan.

get_methods.name: request_window_time
get_methods.description: Return the current election-round loan request window.

compilerAbi.author: STON.fi
compilerAbi.description: Curated STON.fi LP Account v1 interface for stored liquidity balances, add/refund/reset commands, LP Account callbacks, and account data getters

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1Storage

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of this LP Account.

fields.name: poolAddress
fields.description: Pool address paired with this LP Account.

fields.name: amount0
fields.description: Stored balance of the first Jetton token, in basic token units.

fields.name: amount1
fields.description: Stored balance of the second Jetton token, in basic token units.

declarations.description: Current LP Account state stored on-chain.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1AddLiquidity

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated through the liquidity operation.

fields.name: newAmount0
fields.description: Amount of the first Jetton token added to the stored LP Account balance.

fields.name: newAmount1
fields.description: Amount of the second Jetton token added to the stored LP Account balance.

fields.name: minLpOut
fields.description: Minimum required amount of liquidity tokens to receive.

declarations.description: Pool-originated `add_liquidity` message that increases stored token balances and may trigger minting.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1RefundMe

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated to the refund callback.

declarations.description: User-originated `refund_me` command that asks the pool to return stored token balances.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1DirectAddLiquidity

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated through the direct liquidity operation.

fields.name: amount0
fields.description: Amount of the first Jetton token to use for liquidity minting.

fields.name: amount1
fields.description: Amount of the second Jetton token to use for liquidity minting.

fields.name: minLpOut
fields.description: Minimum required amount of liquidity tokens to receive.

declarations.description: User-originated `direct_add_liquidity` command that consumes stored balances for liquidity minting.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1ResetGas

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id for the gas reset command.

declarations.description: User-originated `reset_gas` command that reserves account storage TON and returns the rest to the owner.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1GetterLpAccountDataRequest

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied into the asynchronous getter response.

declarations.description: On-chain `getter_lp_account_data` request; response uses the same opcode with LP Account state appended.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1CbAddLiquidity

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated from the liquidity request.

fields.name: totalAmount0
fields.description: Total amount of the first Jetton token supplied for liquidity.

fields.name: totalAmount1
fields.description: Total amount of the second Jetton token supplied for liquidity.

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of the LP Account that funded this callback.

fields.name: minLpOut
fields.description: Minimum required amount of liquidity tokens to receive.

declarations.description: `cb_add_liquidity` callback sent from LP Account to Pool with token amounts to mint as liquidity.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1CbRefundMe

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated from the refund request.

fields.name: totalAmount0
fields.description: Total amount of the first Jetton token to refund through the pool path.

fields.name: totalAmount1
fields.description: Total amount of the second Jetton token to refund through the pool path.

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of the LP Account being refunded.

declarations.description: `cb_refund_me` callback sent from LP Account to Pool with stored balances to refund.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1GetterLpAccountDataResponse

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id copied from the asynchronous getter request.

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of this LP Account.

fields.name: poolAddress
fields.description: Pool address paired with this LP Account.

fields.name: amount0
fields.description: Stored balance of the first Jetton token, in basic token units.

fields.name: amount1
fields.description: Stored balance of the second Jetton token, in basic token units.

declarations.description: Asynchronous `getter_lp_account_data` response sent to the requester with current LP Account state.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV1DataReply

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of this LP Account.

fields.name: poolAddress
fields.description: Pool address paired with this LP Account.

fields.name: amount0
fields.description: Stored balance of the first Jetton token, in basic token units.

fields.name: amount1
fields.description: Stored balance of the second Jetton token, in basic token units.

declarations.description: Structured result returned by off-chain `get_lp_account_data`.

get_methods.name: get_lp_account_data
get_methods.description: Returns the current LP Account owner, pool, and stored first/second Jetton balances.

compilerAbi.description: Curated STON.fi LP Account v2 interface aligned with docs.ston.fi terminology for get_lp_account_data, on-chain getter query/response, liquidity/refund/reset commands, and LPAccount-to-Pool callbacks; source-proven wire layout is preserved

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV2Storage

fields.name: userAddress
fields.description: Owner address of this LP Account.

fields.name: poolAddress
fields.description: Pool address paired with this LP Account.

fields.name: amount0
fields.description: Stored balance of the first Jetton token, in basic token units.

fields.name: amount1
fields.description: Stored balance of the second Jetton token, in basic token units.

declarations.description: Current LP Account state returned by `get_lp_account_data` and stored on-chain.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV2RefundExcessFields

fields.name: refundAddress
fields.description: Address that receives tokens if liquidity minting is not successful.

fields.name: excessAddress
fields.description: Address that receives remaining TON excesses.

declarations.description: Referenced refund and TON-excess destinations used by liquidity-add messages.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV2CbAddLiquidityAdditionalFields

fields.name: toUserAddress
fields.description: Owner address for newly minted liquidity tokens.

fields.name: refundAddress
fields.description: Address that receives tokens if liquidity minting is not successful.

fields.name: excessAddress
fields.description: Address that receives remaining TON excesses.

declarations.description: Referenced receiver, refund, and TON-excess destinations in `cb_add_liquidity` additional data.

declarations.name: StonfiLpAccountV2AddLiquidity

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated through the liquidity operation.

fields.name: newAmount0
fields.description: Amount of the first Jetton token added to the stored LP Account balance.

fields.name: newAmount1
fields.description: Amount of the second Jetton token added to the stored LP Account balance.

fields.name: minLpOut
fields.description: Minimum required amount of liquidity tokens to receive; zero keeps funds pending.

fields.name: fwdAmount
fields.description: Forward TON amount used with `custom_payload_cs` in the eventual transfer notification.

fields.name: bothPositive
fields.description: If set, minting is attempted only when both stored token balances are non-zero.

fields.name: toUser
fields.description: Owner address for newly minted liquidity tokens.

fields.name: customPayloadCs
fields.description: Optional payload forwarded in the eventual LP token transfer notification.

fields.name: additionalFields
fields.description: Referenced refund and TON-excess destinations.

fields.name: queryId
fields.description: Query id propagated to the refund callback.

fields.name: leftMaybePayload

get_methods.name: get_wallet_address
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic LP wallet address for an owner.

fields.name: isLocked

fields.description: Address that receives collected protocol fees and is authorized by source to call `collect_fees`.

fields.description: Liquidity pool fee value; fee ratio is this value divided by `params::fee_divider` (10000).

fields.name: protocolFee
fields.description: Protocol fee value; fee ratio is this value divided by `params::fee_divider` (10000).

members.name: InsufficientProvideWalletAddressValue
members.description: `provide_wallet_address` message value cannot cover the response budget.

members.name: ZeroOutput
members.description: Burn, collect, or liquidity flow would produce zero output.

members.name: InvalidCaller
members.description: Sender is not the deterministic LP Account, LP Wallet, Router, or protocol-fee address expected by the branch.

members.name: InsufficientGas
members.description: Attached value cannot cover the required downstream gas and forward fees.

members.name: WrongWorkchain
members.description: Sender, owner, receiver, or token wallet is outside the configured base workchain.

members.name: WrongAddress
members.description: Address value is not allowed for this branch, including non-none burn response address.

members.name: LowLiquidity
members.description: Initial liquidity did not provide both token sides.

members.name: InvalidAmount
members.description: Reserve or LP supply update would leave an invalid amount.

members.name: InvalidCall
members.description: Branch is not valid in the current pool state.

members.name: InvalidToken
members.description: Stored token wallet addresses are identical.

members.name: EmptyNotAllowed
members.description: Pool does not accept empty internal message bodies.

members.name: UnsupportedOperation
members.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported by the selected sender branch.

declarations.description: Source-level exit-code catalog for the ConstantProduct Pool paths represented here.

get_methods.name: get_pool_data
get_methods.description: Return current ConstantProduct PoolData; stableswap, weighted_stableswap, and weighted_const_product trailing fields are not present for this pool type.

declarations.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors

members.name: NoLiquidity
members.description: Liquidity-dependent operation had no usable pool or LP-account liquidity.

members.name: ZeroOutput
members.description: Computed output or supplied liquidity was zero.

members.name: InvalidCaller
members.description: Sender was not the deterministic router, LP account, LP wallet, or protocol-fee address expected by a branch.

members.name: InsufficientGas
members.description: Attached TON value cannot cover the required forward/storage/gas budget.

members.name: WrongWorkchain
members.description: Address workchain does not match the configured basechain.

members.name: WrongAddress
members.description: Address field is invalid for the selected operation.

members.name: LowLiquidity
members.description: Initial liquidity is below the required minimum or not both-sided.

members.name: MathError
members.description: Weighted math helper signaled an arithmetic failure.

members.name: InvalidAmount
members.description: Amount, reserve, or weighted parameter is outside accepted bounds.

members.name: InvalidCall
members.description: Operation is invalid for current pool/router upgrade state.

members.name: FeeOutOfRange
members.description: LP or protocol fee is outside configured bounds.

members.name: InvalidToken
members.description: Pool token wallet pair is invalid.

members.name: EmptyNotAllowed
members.description: Empty internal message body is rejected by the pool entrypoint.

members.name: MaxInRatio
members.description: Weighted swap input exceeds the max-in ratio.

members.name: EmptyCell
members.description: Required code cell is empty.

members.name: WrongOp
members.description: Incoming internal opcode is not supported by the selected sender branch.

declarations.description: Source-level exit-code catalog shared by STON.fi DEX core v2 pool handlers.

get_methods.name: get_pool_type
get_methods.description: Return the STON.fi Pool type string, equal to the Router `dex_type` value.

get_methods.name: get_lp_account_address
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic LP Account address for `ownerAddress`.

get_methods.name: get_jetton_data
get_methods.description: Return LP Jetton supply, mintability, router/admin address, content, and wallet code.

get_methods.name: get_wallet_address
get_methods.description: Return the deterministic LP Jetton wallet address for `ownerAddress`.

get_methods.name: get_pool_data
get_methods.description: Return common Pool v2 state plus weighted constant product `w0` at index 12.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.NoLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Liquidity-dependent operation had no usable pool or LP-account liquidity.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.ZeroOutput
thrown_errors.description: Computed output or supplied liquidity was zero.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidCaller
thrown_errors.description: Sender was not the deterministic router, LP account, LP wallet, or protocol-fee address expected by a branch.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InsufficientGas
thrown_errors.description: Attached TON value cannot cover the required forward/storage/gas budget.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongWorkchain
thrown_errors.description: Address workchain does not match the configured basechain.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongAddress
thrown_errors.description: Address field is invalid for the selected operation.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.LowLiquidity
thrown_errors.description: Initial liquidity is below the required minimum or not both-sided.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.MathError
thrown_errors.description: Weighted math helper signaled an arithmetic failure.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidAmount
thrown_errors.description: Amount, reserve, or weighted parameter is outside accepted bounds.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidCall
thrown_errors.description: Operation is invalid for current pool/router upgrade state.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.FeeOutOfRange
thrown_errors.description: LP or protocol fee is outside configured bounds.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.InvalidToken
thrown_errors.description: Pool token wallet pair is invalid.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.EmptyNotAllowed
thrown_errors.description: Empty internal message body is rejected by the pool entrypoint.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.MaxInRatio
thrown_errors.description: Weighted swap input exceeds the max-in ratio.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.EmptyCell
thrown_errors.description: Required code cell is empty.

thrown_errors.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedConstProductErrors.WrongOp
thrown_errors.description: Incoming internal opcode is not supported by the selected sender branch.

declarations.name: StonfiPoolV2WeightedStableswapParams

fields.name: amp
fields.description: Weighted stableswap amplification parameter.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Stable token ratio parameter; initial storage uses zero before a ratio is configured.

fields.name: w0
fields.description: Token 0 weight parameter; source allows one-time initialization while stored `w0` is zero.

fields.name: rateSetterAddress
fields.description: Address with rights to change `rate`, or `addr_none` before a setter is configured.

declarations.description: Persistent weighted StableSwap parameter ref stored between common Pool data and static router/token/code data.

compilerAbi.author: STON.fi
compilerAbi.description: Curated low-level STON.fi DEX v2 Router ABI for getter methods, Jetton transfer payloads, admin operations, and Pool/Vault callbacks. Covers constant_product, stableswap, weighted_stableswap, and weighted_const_product router variants.

declarations.name: StonfiRouterV2Storage

fields.name: isLocked
fields.description: True when `transfer_notification` operations are locked, blocking `swap` and `provide_lp` routing.

fields.name: adminAddress
fields.description: Contract admin account authorized to run Router governance operations.

fields.name: tempUpgrade
fields.description: Pending code, admin, and pool-code upgrade state; zero deadlines mean no pending upgrade.

fields.name: staticData
fields.description: Router id and contract code cells used for deterministic Pool, LP wallet/account, and Vault derivation.

fields.name: upgradePoolCode
fields.description: Finalized Pool code staged by pool-code upgrade finalization and forwarded by `update_pool_code`.

declarations.description: Persistent Router state stored in the root data cell and exposed by `get_router_data`.

fields.name: poolCodeUpgradeDeadline
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the pending pool-code upgrade may be finalized, or zero.

fields.name: pendingAdminAddress
fields.description: Pending admin address; source stores `addr_none` when no admin upgrade is active.

fields.name: pendingRouterCode
fields.description: Pending router code cell, empty when no router-code upgrade is active.

fields.name: pendingPoolCode

compilerAbi.description: Storm Trade smart account for balances, positions, order execution, key management, and highload replay protection.

declarations.name: ExtraCurrenciesMap
declarations.description:
Other modes affect the fee calculation as follows:
+64 substitutes the entire balance of the incoming message as an outgoing value (slightly inaccurate, gas expenses that cannot be estimated before the computation is completed are not taken into account).
+128 substitutes the value of the entire balance of the contract before the start of the computation phase (slightly inaccurate, since gas expenses that cannot be estimated before the completion of the computation phase are not taken into account).
`ExtraCurrenciesMap` represents a dictionary of "extra currencies" other than TON coin.
They can be attached to a message (incoming and outgoing) and stored on contract's balance.
It's a dictionary `[currencyID => amount]` (amount is like `coins`, but encoded with a high precision).

declarations.description: Base VAMM exit codes.

get_methods.name: get_pause_time
get_methods.description: Return current pause-time value; pseudo-asserts export the VAMM error catalog.

get_methods.name: get_amm_contract_data
get_methods.description: Return the raw AMM contract data cell exposed by the on-chain getter.

get_methods.name: get_amm_name
get_methods.description: Return the vault address and Storm asset id for this market.

get_methods.name: get_amm_status
get_methods.description: Return close-only, paused, stopped, and pause-window status flags.

get_methods.name: get_amm_state
get_methods.description: Return reserves, open interest, cumulative premiums, and next funding timestamp.

get_methods.name: get_exchange_settings
get_methods.description: Return fee, risk, funding, executor, and direct-trade settings.

get_methods.name: get_position_manager_address
get_methods.description: Return the position-manager contract address used by this VAMM.

get_methods.name: get_can_liquidate
get_methods.description: Check whether a position can be liquidated for supplied prices and time.

get_methods.name: get_can_force_close
get_methods.description: Check whether a position can be force-closed for supplied prices and time.

get_methods.name: get_can_execute_order
get_methods.description: Check whether an order can execute and return its spot price/error status.

get_methods.name: get_spot_price
get_methods.description: Return the current AMM spot price.

get_methods.name: get_liquidation_price_vpi
get_methods.description: Return the VPI-aware liquidation price for supplied position values.

get_methods.name: get_remain_margin_with_funding_payment
get_methods.description: Return remaining margin, funding payment, PnL, and price data for a position.

get_methods.name: get_terminal_amm_price
get_methods.description: Return the terminal AMM price used by price-adjustment logic.

get_methods.name: get_peg_adjust_cost
get_methods.description: Return the AMM peg-adjustment cost for a supplied price.

get_methods.name: get_adjusted_spot_price
get_methods.description: Return adjusted spot price for supplied index and settlement prices.

get_methods.name: get_validate_signatures
get_methods.description: Validate oracle signatures and return live/created price results plus pause time.

get_methods.name: get_oracle_data
get_methods.description: Return stored oracle price, spread, timestamp, limits, and public-key dictionary.

get_methods.name: get_funding
get_methods.description: Return current long/short funding, premium-to-vault, sync amount, and spot price.

get_methods.name: get_compute_funding_data
get_methods.description: Return computed premium fractions and funding-period count.

get_methods.name: get_premium
get_methods.description: Return the funding premium for a supplied price.

get_methods.name: get_funding_settings
get_methods.description: Return funding-function coefficients and inflection point.

get_methods.name: get_day_trading_data
get_methods.description: Return day-trading activity flag and maximum leverage.

get_methods.name: get_lazer_data
get_methods.description: Return packed Lazer oracle flag and Pyth asset identifiers.

get_methods.name: get_vamm_type
get_methods.description: Return the VAMM type discriminator.

declarations.description: CoinM VAMM exit codes.

get_methods.name: get_pause_time
get_methods.description: Return current pause-time value; pseudo-asserts export the VAMM error catalog.

get_methods.name: get_amm_contract_data
get_methods.description: Return the raw AMM contract data cell exposed by the on-chain getter.

get_methods.name: get_amm_name
get_methods.description: Return the vault address and Storm asset id for this market.

get_methods.name: get_amm_status
get_methods.description: Return close-only, paused, stopped, and pause-window status flags.

get_methods.name: get_amm_state
get_methods.description: Return reserves, open interest, cumulative premiums, and next funding timestamp.

get_methods.name: get_exchange_settings
get_methods.description: Return fee, risk, funding, executor, and direct-trade settings.

get_methods.name: get_position_manager_address
get_methods.description: Return the position-manager contract address used by this VAMM.

get_methods.name: get_can_liquidate
get_methods.description: Check whether a position can be liquidated for supplied prices and time.

get_methods.name: get_can_force_close
get_methods.description: Check whether a position can be force-closed for supplied prices and time.

get_methods.name: get_can_execute_order
get_methods.description: Check whether an order can execute and return its spot price/error status.

get_methods.name: get_spot_price
get_methods.description: Return the current AMM spot price.

get_methods.name: get_liquidation_price_vpi
get_methods.description: Return the VPI-aware liquidation price for supplied position values.

get_methods.name: get_remain_margin_with_funding_payment
get_methods.description: Return remaining margin, funding payment, PnL, and price data for a position.

get_methods.name: get_terminal_amm_price
get_methods.description: Return the terminal AMM price used by price-adjustment logic.

get_methods.name: get_peg_adjust_cost
get_methods.description: Return the AMM peg-adjustment cost for a supplied price.

get_methods.name: get_adjusted_spot_price
get_methods.description: Return adjusted spot price for supplied index and settlement prices.

get_methods.name: get_validate_signatures
get_methods.description: Validate oracle signatures and return live/created price results plus pause time.

get_methods.name: get_oracle_data
get_methods.description: Return stored oracle price, spread, timestamp, limits, and public-key dictionary.

get_methods.name: get_funding
get_methods.description: Return current long/short funding, premium-to-vault, sync amount, and spot price.

get_methods.name: get_compute_funding_data
get_methods.description: Return computed premium fractions and funding-period count.

get_methods.name: get_premium
get_methods.description: Return the funding premium for a supplied price.

get_methods.name: get_funding_settings
get_methods.description: Return funding-function coefficients and inflection point.

get_methods.name: get_day_trading_data
get_methods.description: Return day-trading activity flag and maximum leverage.

get_methods.name: get_lazer_data
get_methods.description: Return packed Lazer oracle flag and Pyth asset identifiers.

get_methods.name: get_vamm_type
get_methods.description: Return the VAMM type discriminator.

get_methods.name: get_settlement_oracle_data
get_methods.description: Return CoinM settlement oracle price, spread, timestamp, limits, and asset id.

declarations.name: TelemintNftItemErrors

members.name: BadSubdomainLength
members.description: DNS subdomain length is not byte-aligned.

members.name: NotEnoughFunds
members.description: Remaining balance after storage, forward amount, and fees would be negative.

members.name: UnknownOp
members.description: Incoming internal message opcode is not supported.

members.name: Uninitialized
members.description: Item state is still uninitialized.

members.name: TooSmallStake
members.description: Bid is below the current minimum.

members.name: ForbiddenNotDeploy
members.description: Initialization message was not sent by the stored collection.

members.name: ForbiddenNotStake
members.description: Active auction accepts only plain zero-op bid transfers.

members.name: ForbiddenTopup
members.description: Top-up is allowed only from the current owner after auction end.

members.name: ForbiddenTransfer
members.description: Transfer is allowed only from the current owner.

members.name: ForbiddenChangeDns
members.description: DNS record changes are allowed only from the current owner.

members.name: NoAuction
members.description: No active auction exists.

members.name: ForbiddenAuction
members.description: Auction management is allowed only from the current owner.

members.name: AlreadyHasStakes
members.description: Auction cancellation is forbidden after bids have arrived.

members.name: InvalidAuctionConfig
members.description: Auction config violates source bounds.

members.name: IncorrectWorkchain
members.description: Address workchain is not zero.

members.name: NoFirstZeroByte
members.description: DNS subdomain does not start with the required zero byte.

declarations.description: TeleMint item exit-code catalog from official FunC source.

get_methods.name: get_nft_data
get_methods.description: Return item initialization flag, index, collection, owner, and individual content.

get_methods.name: get_full_domain
get_methods.description: Return full DNS domain slice as `domain + token_name + zero byte`.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_token_name
get_methods.description: Return the TeleMint token name, for example a Telegram username without `@`.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_auction_state
get_methods.description: Return active auction state; throws `NoAuction` when no auction is active.

get_methods.name: get_telemint_auction_config
get_methods.description: Return active auction configuration, or zero values with `addr_none` when no auction is active.

get_methods.name: royalty_params
get_methods.description: Return stored royalty parameters.

get_methods.name: dnsresolve
get_methods.description: Resolve a DNS subdomain/category pair through the item's DNS record dictionary.
